FY2025 would be January 1, 2025 to December 31, 2025 (assuming calendar year fiscal year).

On an actual-close basis (not recast):
- X Holdings: merged March 28, 2025, so it would be included from March 28, 2025 to December 31, 2025. That's approximately 9 months (April through December = 9 months, or more precisely about 9 months and 3 days).
- xAI: merged February 2, 2026, so it was NOT included in FY2025 on an actual-close basis at all. It would be 0 months in FY2025.

But wait - the filing context says the consolidated financial statements have been retrospectively recast under common-control accounting to include both xAI and X Holdings for all historical periods presented. So on a recast basis, both entities appear in all periods. But on an actual-close basis, the question is about when they were actually merged.
